Figure 12: Box plots for SSIM comparison of images restored by adversarial optimization attacks under FedSGD (M = 10 and N = 5). The box represents the interquartile range between the first and third quartiles (Q1 and Q3). The whiskers extend to the minimum and maximum values within the interval [Q1 − 1.5(Q3 − Q1), Q3 + 1.5(Q3 − Q1)]. The line inside each box corresponds to the median, while the mean value is indicated by a cross.
